title: Delinquency
body:
About

Harmlessly harm your friends with slimes and gooping.

![Sliming Feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f3912534d3c23c266d91504514ef5979a958c3.png)
Pick up tiny slimes with [sneak] + [r-click] and hurl them at your friends. On hit, they become gooped and have a slimy overlay on their screen. (More annoying features like egging to come)

Dependencies

See the specific Delinquency version for dependency requirements and details.
You can download the correct dependecies by viewing the respective versions.
